================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 6C 21 06 1A 81
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x65
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : -3
RetValSize     : 21

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x65
PayloadLen   : 21

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
98 11 84 69 40 04 FB 0B 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
00 00 00 00 00 

[RETURN VALUE]
98 11 84 69 40 04 FB 0B 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
00 00 00 00 00 

[BINARY DATA]
